summary: New SyncState helper writes ~/.local/share/granola-pp-cli/sync_state.json (atomic tmp+rename) capturing last sync timestamp, decrypt status, error class on failure, token source, and documents fetched. sync_cache.go writes on every run (success or decrypt failure). doctor.go adds an EncryptedStore check that distinguishes no-install / pre-encryption / present-no-sync / ok / failed-with-class states by reading the sync state file - never invoking safestorage.Decrypt, so doctor never triggers the Keychain prompt.
reason: Plan U5 requirement: doctor must surface the four-state encrypted-store diagnostic without prompting the user, so it stays a pure observation command. The previous design (attempt-with-timeout) was unachievable because /usr/bin/security either blocks on prompt or succeeds silently.
